title: antirrhinum lanigerum
intro: Antirrhinum lanigerum, also known as woolly snapdragon, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to the western United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antirrhinum lanigerum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
